reason: Mafia heir orchestrates bloody power grab with no mercy or remorse
Don’s brutal ambition leaves a trail of destruction, no redemption
Loyal gangster thrives on violence, betrays all in his rise to power
Psychotic youth’s ultra-violence knows no moral boundaries
Couple’s murderous spree glamorized by media, victims forgotten forever
Corrupt magnate’s betrayal of trust shatters all around him
Unstoppable killer executes flawless revenge with chilling precision
Shadowy mastermind pulls strings, leaves world in his ruthless wake
Vengeful ex-con unleashes terror on unsuspecting suburban family
Disillusioned loner’s violent crusade wreaks havoc without apology
